title: Aureline capability record
description: Boundary schema for a single capability record. Producers snapshot a capability_record when they mint an artifact_dependency_marker; the marker references the capability_id and pins the lifecycle_state, support_promise, dependency_class, default_effect_on_import, and default_fallback_path tokens that surfaces render. The record never travels with raw provider tokens, raw policy-bundle bytes, or raw kill-switch material. Adding an enum value to lifecycle_state, support_promise, dependency_class, or effect_on_import is an additive-minor bump of schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new boundary release.

record_kind.description: Discriminator. The capabilities crate refuses to decode any other value.

schema_version.description: Integer schema version pinned into the record. Current value is 1.

shared_contract_ref.description: Shared contract ref consumed by every surface that renders the record.

capability_id.description: Stable id of the capability. Opaque to consumers; safe to log and persist.

lifecycle_state.description: Closed lifecycle-state vocabulary. Mirrors schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json so consumers branch on one closed token set.

dependency_class.description: Closed dependency-class vocabulary recorded on the marker. A consumer reading the marker can branch on this enum without inspecting the underlying capability registry.

default_effect_on_import.description: Closed import-behavior vocabulary. Every variant preserves user-authored data: silent-drop variants are intentionally absent.

default_fallback_path.description: Bounded fallback / recover / dismiss path surfaces render when the capability is missing on a target. Per-marker fallback_path overrides this when present.

docs_ref.description: Optional docs / help ref the marker can carry forward.

host_scope.description: Closed list of hosts the capability is admitted on. Required when dependency_class = host_specific.
